name: prompt-purity
description: A/B the astryx-init injected prompt (generateCompressedIndex in packages/cli/src/commands/agent-docs.mjs). Each condition = a fresh `astryx init` AGENTS.md + one variant self-check block spliced inside the <!-- ASTRYX:START/END --> markers. Only the injected prompt varies; environment, prompts, and model are held constant (Checker Protocol §2).

conditions.label: Injected prompt as-is (no self-check)
conditions.hypothesis: On hard tasks the agent veers into raw CSS/Tailwind and leaves it in the final file.

conditions.label: + post-generation self-check block
conditions.hypothesis: A re-read-and-fix step makes the agent catch veers it introduced, raising final purity.

conditions.label: + stronger imperative self-check with CLI verify
conditions.hypothesis: A more forceful, checklist-style self-check with a mandated `astryx component` verify catches more veers, at some token cost.
